reason:
close_out_reason: Set 044 Session 4 close via S4a+S4b checkpoint-split. S4b deliverables (claude-narration-results.md + cross-backend-synthesis.md) authored, Round A verification via gemini-pro returned VERIFIED with 3 forward-looking nice-to-haves applied to cross-backend-synthesis.md §8. Cumulative Set 044 routed spend $0.292 of $15.00 NTE.

manual_verify_attestation: Round A verification via ai_router.query → gemini-pro returned VERIFIED on the S4b bundle (claude-narration-results.md + cross-backend-synthesis.md + spec.md S4 excerpt + narration-design.md + copilot-narration-results.md, 113578 chars, 35477 in / 1352 out, $0.0578663). Verifier artifact committed at docs/session-sets/044-ai-chat-log-discovery-and-experiments/verification-output/round-a-session-4b-result.json. Three Section G nice-to-haves applied as cross-backend-synthesis.md §8 additions (items 6, 7, 8) covering hook-channel delivery reconsideration, Branch A/B simplification, and potential S5 re-design expansion. S4a Round A + Round B verification artifacts (round-a-session-4a-result.json + round-b-session-4a-result.json) also committed in the same commit b7f0e16.

reason:
close_out_reason: Set 044 Session 5 close via cross-provider consensus (Pass A + Pass B per workflow.md §Prompt-framing discipline). proposal.md v1 published as post-consensus architectural commitment; proposal-consensus-journal.md records both passes; Set 045 spec stub created; Sets 037-041 cancelled with audit-history CANCELLED.md + state-file status flipped to "cancelled" per Set 035's sole-truth migration; Copilot effort sidebar closed §11 Q3 (gen_ai.request.reasoning_effort OMITTED at low+medium+high; Branch A dead on Copilot). Cumulative Set 044 routed spend across S1-S5: $1.7442 of $15.00 NTE (well under budget).

manual_verify_attestation: Cross-provider consensus verification via ai_router.query → six provider calls in two passes returned ENDORSE-WITH-REVISIONS and resolved S6 GO/NO-GO. Pass A (initial framing, bias-cautions preamble on): gpt-5-4 ($0.158, NO-GO S6), gemini-pro ($0.044, GO S6), opus-4-6 ($0.602, GO S6). Pass B (devil's-advocate steelman of 3 specific contrarian claims): gpt-5-4 ($0.117, strengthened NO-GO), gemini-pro ($0.040, FLIPPED to NO-GO), opus-4-6 ($0.491, GO with revised co-primary scope). 3/3 Pass B providers acknowledged that proposal v0 §8.7's framing biased Pass A toward "wrapper-primary" language; corrected to "dual-primary, two co-equal channels." S6 vote flipped from 2 GO / 1 NO-GO to 2 NO-GO / 1 conditional-GO. Verification artifacts at verification-output/pass-{a,b}-{gpt-5-4,gemini-pro,opus-4-6}.json. Pass A + Pass B drivers preserved as consensus_pass_{a,b}.py for audit-reproducibility. Both passes verified the harvest direction, the dual-primary architecture, the per-turn-narration retirement, the wrapper location in ai_router/, the Set 045 implementation deferral, and the Sets 037-041 cancellation. proposal-consensus-journal.md §6 documents a framing-bias finding as a recommendation back to docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md (promote devil's-advocate two-pass from "conditional" to "default" for roadmap-reshape decisions).
